children.text: Performs "(Last Night) I Gambled With My Anger And Lost", instrumental intro [drums, electric guitar, bass, synth].
Continues piece, John Giorno recites poetry [English] over top of the music.
Continues piece, instrumental [synth, bass, electric drums].
Continues piece, instrumental [guitar, electric drums, synth].
Continues piece, instrumental [synth, bass, electric drums].
Continues piece, instrumental [bass, guitar, synth, electric drums].
Continues piece, instrumental [electric drums, electric guitar, synth].
Performs piece [John Giorno recites poetry over top of electric drums and gravelly electronic sound].
Continues piece, instrumental [electric drums, gravelly electronic sound, bass].
Continues piece, instrumental [electric guitar, electric drums, bass, gravelly electronic sound].
Continues piece, instrumental [synth, bass, electric drums].
Continues piece, instrumental [synth, bass, electric drums].
Guitar, bass, and drums sounds ring out.
Light thumping sound and distorted voice.
Performs "Stretching it Wider" [John Giorno recites poetry over top of electric guitar, bass, and percussion].
Continues piece, instrumental [electric guitar, bass, and percussion].
Continues piece, instrumental [synth, bass, percussion, electronic sounds].
Continues piece, instrumental [synth, bass, percussion, electric guitar, electronic sounds].
Continues piece, instrumental [guitar, synth, percussion, bass].
Continues piece, instrumental [synth, percussion, electronic sounds, bass].
Okay. This is a poem called "Life is a Killer".
Guitar chord rings out, echoes and becomes distorted.
Performs piece, instrumental intro [distorted reverberant electric guitar].
Continues piece, John Giorno recites poetry [English] over top of the music.
Continues piece [recitation, synth, electric guitar, electric drums, electronic sounds].
Continues piece, recitation resumes, music shifts [electronic percussion and synth].
Continues piece, music shifts [vocal stings] [recitation continues].
Continues piece, music shifts [synth and percussion only] [recitation continues].
Continues piece, music shifts [electric guitar only] [recitation continues].
Continues piece, music shifts [synth only] [recitation continues].
Continues piece, instrumental [synth and electric guitar].
Electronic keyboard sounds, bass, and electric guitar notes ring out.
Performs piece, instrumental intro [electronic percussion, synth, electric guitar, electronic keyboard, electronic sounds, bass].
Continues piece, John Giorno recites poetry [English] over top of the music.
Continues piece, music shifts [volume fades then comes back in] [recitation continues].
Continues piece, music shifts [synth only] [recitation continues].
Ok, uh, next I'm gonna introduce the band, our band leader and composer [electric guitar lick] and the guy who holds it all together is CP Roth.
And on guitar is Adam Roth.
Guitar, synth, and drum sounds ring out.
Performs "Scum and Slime", instrumental intro [electric guitar, synth, bass, electronic percussion].
Continues piece, John Giorno recites poetry [English] over top of the music.
Continues piece, music shifts [recorded vocals echo recitation].
Continues piece, instrumental [electric guitar, synth, bass, electronic percussion, electronic sounds].
Continues piece, music shifts [recorded vocals echo recitation].
Continues piece, instrumental [electric guitar, synth, bass, electronic percussion, electronic sounds].
Continues piece, instrumental [electronic chimes, electric guitar, bass, synth, electronic percussion].
Performs piece, instrumental intro [drums, shouting, unintelligible voices].
Continues piece, music shifts [electric guitar, synth, drums].
Continues piece, John Giorno recites poetry [English] over top of the music.
Continues piece, music shifts [drums only] [recitation continues].
Continues piece, instrumental [electric guitar, synth, percussion].
Continues piece, recitation resumes, music shifts [synth only].
Continues piece, music cuts out [recitation only].
Continues piece, music resumes, instrumental [synth and electric guitar].
Continues piece, music shifts [drums added] [recitation continues].
Continues piece, instrumental [drums, synth, and electric guitar].
We had 'em last November, we got 'em now, and we're gonna get 'em back again.
Let's let him rest now and -
Uh, in a few minutes we'll have a very very special guest to wrap up, uh, pour finir Ultimatum cinq jours deja passe puis, uh, on a garde, uh, quelque chose de tres speciale pour la fin.
On a garde uh, quelque chose de tres speciale pour la fin [off mic].
